required_features.description: At least one body-only case is present in qualification inputs.
At least one wing-only case is present in qualification inputs.
At least one body+wing+horizontal+vertical configuration is present.
At least one forward horizontal-surface (canard) case is present.
At least one TYPE=1 wing case is present.
At least one TYPE=2 wing case is present.
At least one TYPE=3 wing case is present.
At least one case with EXPR inputs is present.
At least one subsonic Mach point (<0.9) is present.
At least one transonic Mach point (0.9-1.2) is present.
At least one supersonic Mach point (1.2-5.0) is present.
At least one case explicitly sets HYPERS true.
